ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "brief_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Planning, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "pumpkin_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pumpkin holder (main responsible person) */,
  "ants_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ants (additional responsible persons) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_ants_id FOREIGN KEY ("ants_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_pumpkin_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("pumpkin_holder_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Translator, Developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "project_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_phases" (
  "project_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project phase */,
  "project_phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the project phase */,
  "project_phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the project phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "status_changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the task is scheduled to start */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the task is due */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_task_assignments" (
  "task_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES project_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., OSIS, TEI, PDF) */,
  "uploaded_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_uploaded_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_file_versions" (
  "file_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the file version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES project_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "released_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_released_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("released_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comment_replies" (
  "comment_reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES project_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Proposal, Report, Specification) */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_document_sections" (
  "document_section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document section */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "section_content" TEXT /* Content of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_document_sections_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES project_documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone is due */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestone_dependencies" (
  "milestone_dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone dependency */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone */,
  "dependent_milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestone_dependencies_dependent_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_milestone_id") REFERENCES project_milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestone_dependencies_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES project_milestones ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., Software, Hardware, Personnel) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_resource_allocations" (
  "resource_allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_resource_allocations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES project_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_resource_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
